lore.english:
Demon. A Dark Elf living in a forest deep in the mountains of the demon realm. Among all Elves that elaborately use the forces of nature, Dark Elves in particular can use extraordinary demonic powers.

Eleonor fuses the forces of nature with her demonic powers and uses them in divination, rituals, and combat.

Due to their rarity, Dark Elves have piqued the interest of those who rule in the demon realm, leading to repeated attacks on their village. Eleonor's younger sister is one of the dark elves who have been abducted and sold by human traffickers, which is the reason she came to the human world to rescue her.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&CRI_RES] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase CRIT RES of Balanced allies by 10% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase CRIT RES of Balanced allies by 10% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Aqua Tears[-]
skills.description:
Shoots 3 water bubbles consecutively at the enemy, attacking them.
Reduces [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of target hit by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:480102]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:480102]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Shoots 3 water bubbles consecutively at the enemy, attacking them.
Reduces Turn Gauge of target hit by (15%) at a 5% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Droplet of Protection[-]
skills.description:
Grants [&Shield] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:480201]%[-] of the target's Max. [&HP] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:480201] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Grants Shield equal to 21% of the target's Max. HP to ALL allies.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Defensive Nectar[-]
skills.description:
Grants [&DeBuffBlock] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] using the power of nature.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:480301] turn(s)
Additionally grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:480302]%)[-] [&DefUp] if the allies other than the character with granted [&DeBuffBlock] doesn't have any [&DeBuff].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:480302] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Grants Debuff Block to ALL allies using the power of nature.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Additionally grants (45%) DEF UP if the allies other than the character with granted Debuff Block doesn't have any Debuff.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Dark Elf of the Dark Woods[-]
skills.name_readable: Dark Elf of the Dark Woods
skills.description: On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart] restores [&HP] of an ally with a [&Shield] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:480401]%[-] of the target's Max. [&HP].
skills.description_readable: On Turn Start restores HP of an ally with a Shield by 4.5% of the target's Max. HP.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_4801]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_4803]
skill_data.description:
Grants [&DeBuffBlock] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] using the power of nature.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:481301] turn(s)
Additionally grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:481302]%)[-] [&AtkUp] if the allies other than the character with granted [&DeBuffBlock] doesn't have any [&DeBuff].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:481302] turn(s)
skill_data.description_readable:
Grants Debuff Block to ALL allies using the power of nature.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Additionally grants (45%) ATK UP if the allies other than the character with granted Debuff Block doesn't have any Debuff.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_4802]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_4804]
skill_data.name_readable: <Dark Green Embryo> Dark Elf of the Dark Woods
skill_data.description: On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], if an ally other than the character holds [&Shield], increases the duration of [V3:481401] random [&Buff](s) by [V2:481401] turn(s).
skill_data.description_readable: On Turn Start, if an ally other than the character holds Shield, increases the duration of 1 random Buff(s) by 1 turn(s).
